query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A rooftop view with mechanical equipment including cylindrical metal vents, vertical pipes, and a grey rectangular structure with a white door. Bare deciduous tree branches rise behind the roofline, and a tall utility pole with crossbars is visible in the middle distance. The scene is set under heavy overcast fog that reduces visibility of the sky and background, creating a seamless grey-white expanse above the roofline.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A rooftop scene rendered in muted, washed-out grey tones with flat lighting and oppressive low contrast. Mechanical equipment including cylindrical metal vents, vertical pipes, and a grey structure with a white door occupy the foreground, while bare tree branches and a distant utility pole dissolve into heavy atmospheric fog. The desaturated palette and absence of directional light or shadows collapse depth into a suffocating, featureless grey expanse, evoking atmospheric distress and melancholy.
